channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Samalamadingdong
item.description:
Sam Reich finally gets a taste of his own medicine.

Duration: 45:10

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Outvoted"
item.description:
Take a look behind the scenes of Game Changer's season 7 finale episode, “Outvoted.”

Duration: 12:29

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, kevin stiller, ryan creamer, paul robalino, justin cyrul, jessyka blanco, jazzy collins, ash kron, behind the scenes

item.title: Outvoted
item.description:
Brennan, Aabria, Vic, Ally, and Demi campaign to be president of Dropout.

Duration: 52:06

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, ending, mad skills, unscripted, brennan lee mulligan, aabria iyengar, vic michaelis, ally beardsley, demi adejuyigbe, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Who Wants to Be Jacob Wysocki?"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "Who Wants to Be Jacob Wysocki?"

Duration: 14:47

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, ryan creamer, kurt maloney, jessyka blanco, sam geer, ash kron, justin cyrul, kevin stiller, chloe badner, nico romero, behind the scenes
